name: @borjie/internal-software-generator
description: On-Demand Internal Software (Wave M8-M9) — Mr. Mwikila generates a sealed bundle (form schema + handler fn + dashboard archetype + audit hook) when the owner names a tool in a sentence. Lifecycle: draft → staged → live → archived; authority gate: T1 default, T2 for mutating tools. See Docs/DESIGN/ON_DEMAND_INTERNAL_SOFTWARE_SPEC.md.
